title: Useless Things
description: Mod that adds some pretty "useless" things.
body:
### Useless mod that adds 3 useless tools, energy generator, and 4 more useless items.
![Craft the thing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/NEeuMhS3/images/2675b8822a9985df2e5bd871e87b70a44dc303d2.png) - To craft core item in this modpack you need to combine ender pearl and gunpower - Tools are crafted from useless ingot. *What did u expect anyway* > Ingot is crafted from pearl shards and iron - For generator you will need 7 obsidian blocks, redstone dust and the best
item ever -> Useless Core > Dont forget to power the generator with some redstone magic - There is also a 0.1% chance for the best item in the game to drop from leaves. > And no its not the core. It is even better then the core. > Try right clicking with the item on some blocks. You wont regret it. ![Tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/NEeuMhS3/images/23e9ffada0260bdf0bbb83ccc9747e1a5f9b5ec0.png) This mod really helps early game gameplay. You can use the generator with any other mod that uses Energy API. ![required](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/37a21e3b0e74082805b6ea61013af272ca5bf447.png)
